pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.sh cleanup script and export_result.sh evaluation checks
Verified against setup_task.sh directory creation and export_result.sh variables
Verified against export_result.sh KEYFILE_ORDER string which tests the exact sequential ordering

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a synthetic 50 MB VeraCrypt volume at '/home/ga/Volumes/root_ca_storage.hc', protected by the password 'TripartiteControl2026!' and three specific keyfiles (CEO_Token_Keys.pub, CFO_Token_Budget.csv, Legal_Token_NDA.txt) located in '/home/ga/Documents/OfficerTokens'. The verification scripts explicitly enforce this exact configuration, including the precise sequential order of the keyfiles, by attempting to mount the volume using VeraCrypt CLI with various keyfile combinations and expecting strict order adherence to succeed.
